data.raceName: YOU'RE ON A WINNER WITH BETDELUXE
data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. PACKHAM ROSE could manage only second but ran speedy time (23.74) at this track over 407m. Can measure up if runs up to latest time. 3. BOONIE'S BELL was a course and distance placegetter (24.30) last time also from the same draw, finishing a 2.25 lengths second in a Grade 6. Good beginner and aided by a handy draw. Worth another try. 6. HARA'S DEBBIE was strongly supported last start but missed the frame when sixth (24.84), beaten 10 lengths. One of the better chances. 1. BOONIE'S MATE was out of the frame here most recently but can atone.","runners":[7,3,6,1],"exclusive":false}
